---
title: "Development"
---

This page documents common development workflows for **VedicDateTime**.

## Repository

- Source: [github.com/neerajdhanraj/VedicDateTime](https://github.com/neerajdhanraj/VedicDateTime)
- Issues: [github.com/neerajdhanraj/VedicDateTime/issues](https://github.com/neerajdhanraj/VedicDateTime/issues)

## GitHub Actions

The repository uses GitHub Actions for checks and for building the website (Quarto) and API docs (pkgdown).

## Install development dependencies

```r
install.packages(c("devtools", "testthat", "roxygen2"))
```

## Install from source

From the repository root:

```r
devtools::install()
```

## Run tests

```r
devtools::test()
```

## Run checks

```r
devtools::check(build_args = c("--compact-vignettes=gs+qpdf"))
```

## Build

```r
devtools::build(args = c("--compact-vignettes=gs+qpdf"))
```

## CRAN-style checks (rhub)

```r
# install.packages("rhub")
rhub::check_for_cran(check_args = c("--compact-vignettes=gs+qpdf"))
```

## Documentation

- Function documentation is generated from roxygen comments and appears under `man/`.
- The website API reference is generated using **pkgdown**.

Build pkgdown locally:

```r
install.packages("pkgdown")
pkgdown::build_site(dest_dir = "docs/pkgdown", preview = FALSE)
```

## Website

The website source lives in `site/` and is built with Quarto.

Render locally:

```bash
quarto render site
```
